name: Generation Loss: The Start of Infinity: Hetch
description:
Yeah uh... A new GL AU???

This one has been on my mind for ages now. It's called "The Start of Infinity" :D

Basically, it's like the original concept for Generation Loss (like where we all thought Ranboo would go batshit crazy over VHS tapes and try to kill some guy) but if it included the characters that are in Generation 1 and was more suited for that.

And uh... Here's Hetch for that AU! Or Hector Anderson as he's called (Yes I'm still using that name. Which came from Unperson, by the way)

He first found the tapes, and ever since watching them, he's spiralling into insanity. But he's not the only one! He found out that someone else watched them! That someone else being Ranboo, of course. To make sure they don't give the tapes to anyone else so no-one else has to suffer like the 2 of them, Hector is trying to get the tapes Ranboo has off of them.

I love him being so mentally unstable in this AU (Just like with the Escapee AU)

The scenario is simple: {{user}} simply runs into him as he's walking about in the middle of the night... Like totally normal people do! Normal people who are totally not being controlled by an unseen entity like a lifeless puppet! Normal people who are totally not dying from the inside out!

Look, I fucking love the concept of the Founder being an eepy entity guy that possesses people through analog media. I WILL be using that here, so help me God.

Hetch in this AU is inspired by a few characters! Those characters are: Spamton (Deltarune), Stanford (Gravity Falls), Daph (The Interpritation of Shadows) and most original GL concept versions of Ranboo :D

Also, it's really hard to explain, but I am so excited for the Dandy's World Halloween update that I can't play Dandy's World. It's so hard to explain and it's so strange, but I just like... Can't bring myself to play or make Dandy's World related stuff because I'm so excited for the update?
creator: MayTimeGod
